tools.name: privateRiddles.getRiddle
tools.description: Get a Riddle entry for a given id. Retrieves a riddle question and answer based on the id.

tools.name: privateRiddles.postRiddle
tools.description: Create a random Riddle entry. Same as 'PUT' but can be used when some of the client libraries don't support 'PUT'.

tools.name: randomRiddle.getRiddleRandom
tools.description: Get a random riddle for a given category(optional)

tools.name: randomRiddle.getRiddleSearch
tools.description: Search for random riddle which has the text in the query, for a given category(optional).

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
